name: Covered Educational TRNSPRTN
districts_or_customers: likely private schools in Broward/Miami-Dade area
recent_news: No public news found. Appears to be a small Fort Lauderdale-area educational transportation operator; no entity record surfaced in web search results and not present on M-DCPS approved private bus company list.
fit_notes: Likely micro-operator (~$1.5M revenue, 32 employees) running vans for private schools in South Florida. Sub-scale for Summit tuck-in unless clustered with other Broward acquisitions; route-density only.

name: Mani Private School Trnsprtn
recent_news: No public news, website, or Sunbiz match surfaced. Homestead-area micro school-van operator; not on the M-DCPS approved private bus company list reviewed.
fit_notes: Tiny Homestead-area private-school van operator; ~$1.4M revenue. Below Summit's tuck-in threshold standalone; only relevant as part of a roll-up of South Florida private-school van contractors.

name: XTRA Mile School Bus LLC
recent_news: No M&A or news found. Florida LLC (separate from unrelated X-Tra Mile Automotive LLC in St. Augustine). Not listed on the M-DCPS approved private bus company directory reviewed.
fit_notes: Owner-operator school van service in West Miami-Dade managed by Leonor Martinez. ~$1.4M revenue / 32 employees is sub-scale for a standalone Summit tuck-in but could be folded into a broader Miami private-school van consolidation.

name: Bright Futures School TRNSPRTN
districts_or_customers: likely Lee County (Lehigh Acres) private/charter schools
recent_news: Bright Futures School Transportation LLC was newly formed January 13, 2025 (FL Doc # L25000021133); Marga Lopez is sole manager and registered agent. No annual report yet on file as of late 2025.
fit_notes: Brand-new (2025) single-operator LLC in Lehigh Acres; too young and too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in. Low succession signal (recently founded). Watch-list only.

name: Magic Van School Trnsprtn LLC
districts_or_customers: likely Lee County (Lehigh Acres) private/charter schools
recent_news: No public news, website, or M&A activity found. Lehigh Acres micro-operator in the same cluster as Bright Futures and Lisdie Montano School Transportation; market is fragmented among single-operator school van LLCs.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~$1.4M revenue / 33 employees) family-run school-van LLC in Lehigh Acres. Only interesting to Summit as a tag-along in a Lee County roll-up alongside other Lehigh Acres operators (Lisdie Montano, Bright Futures, etc.).
